codeReview.summary: Implementation is solid. CrossEncoderReranker trait with SimpleReranker (keyword overlap + phrase matching + term density) and MockReranker for testing. Clean integration into TripleStreamService via search_with_reranking method. 28 comprehensive tests covering all reranking functionality pass.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. Created cross_encoder_rerank.rs module with CrossEncoderReranker trait, SimpleReranker (keyword-based scoring with Jaccard similarity, phrase matching, term density), MockReranker for testing, and CrossEncoderService for orchestration. Integrated into TripleStreamService via search_with_reranking method. All 28 tests pass. Implementation meets expected behavior: takes top-N candidates from retriever, performs cross-encoder reranking, returns final ranking maximizing relevance.
